title: Takeda — Projects
html:
Takeda Active Projects & Workstreams

Governing Thought

Takeda has 11 active projects across 5+ therapeutic areas — making it the most diverse ZoomRx account by TA count and methodology breadth. The project portfolio includes PET, Conference Studies, Color Preference RTs, Radiographic RTs, a Global Pulse, Medical Data Assessments, a prelaunch study, and an AI Workshop. Three themes define the portfolio: (1) pre-launch pipeline positioning dominates — 5 of 11 active projects are for pipeline assets (zasocitinib, mezagitamab) or franchise defense (Entyvio VERDICT); (2) novel methodology adoption sets Takeda apart — Color Preference RTs, Radiographic RTs, and Conference Studies are project types rarely seen at other ZoomRx accounts; and (3) the absence of core tracking services (PET, ATU, Message Testing) on flagship brands (Entyvio, Takhzyro) represents the single largest revenue gap on the account.

Account Health Dashboard

# Project TA Type Status Last Activity Key Signal
1 Entyvio VERDICT Prelaunch 2026 GI Prelaunch :green_circle: Active Apr 2026 (KO, Survey, Recruitment) Biosimilar defense — Takeda's #1 franchise; strategic project
2 Mezagitamab Color Preference RT Hematology Color Pref RT :green_circle: Active Apr 2026 (Client Materials, Survey, Call notes) Pre-launch branding for IgAN asset
3 Neuroscience Conference Study AAN 2026 Neuroscience Conference Study :green_circle: Active Mar 2026 (Pre/Post Conference surveys) Recurring conference study pattern — 4th in series
4 Zasocitinib Color Preference RT Derm/Immunology Color Pref RT :green_circle: Active Feb 2026 (Deliverables, SOW, Survey) Pre-launch branding for TYK2 inhibitor
5 Zasocitinib Global Pulse Derm/Immunology Global Pulse :yellow_circle: Recent Nov 2025 (Proposal, KO, Call Notes) Global market shaping; signals Takeda's global launch thinking
6 HAE Medical Data Assessment Rare Disease Medical Data :yellow_circle: Recent Oct 2025 (AE Training, Deliverables, Switching Topline) Medical affairs engagement; rare disease depth
7 Takeda AI Workshop Cross-TA AI Workshop :white_circle: Complete Oct 2025 (Transcripts, Offsite Presentation) Innovation signal — strategic above-brand engagement
8 Plaque Psoriasis Medical Data Feedback Derm/Immunology Medical Data :yellow_circle: Recent Oct 2025 Medical affairs; PsO market
9 Psoriasis Radiographic RT 2025 Derm/Immunology Radiographic RT :yellow_circle: Recent Sep 2025 (Analysis, Report, SOW) Novel methodology — visual clinical assessment
10 Rare GI PET 2025-26 GI PET :green_circle: Active Aug 2025 (Eohilia tracking, Weekly Check-in deck) Core PET tracker — Eohilia franchise monitoring
11 Narcolepsy Conference Studies (SLEEP + World Sleep Congress) Neuroscience Conference Study :yellow_circle: Recent May-Aug 2025 (Pre/Post surveys) Established conference study pattern

Legend: :green_circle: Active/On Track | :yellow_circle: Recent (activity within 6 months) | :red_circle: Risk | :blue_circle: Pipeline/Planned | :white_circle: Complete

Detailed Workstream Profiles

GI

Entyvio VERDICT Prelaunch 2026

Status: Active | Latest: Apr 2026 (KO, Survey, Recruitment) | Brand: Entyvio (vedolizumab)

What it is: Prelaunch research for an Entyvio franchise extension or reformulation ("VERDICT" likely refers to a specific clinical program or brand extension). The project includes kickoff, survey design, and recruitment phases — indicating a quantitative study with HCP respondents.

Why it matters:

  • Entyvio is Takeda's largest brand (~$6-7B global [UNVERIFIED])
  • Biosimilar competition expected 2025-2026 — this is franchise defense research
  • First Entyvio-specific project at ZoomRx — opens the door to Entyvio PET, ATU, and competitive tracking

Watch items:

  • Survey field timing and topline delivery dates — track closely
  • Client satisfaction on this project directly determines whether Entyvio becomes a recurring ZoomRx engagement
  • Identify the Entyvio franchise contacts from this SOW — highest BD value contacts on the account

Recs:

  • Use VERDICT delivery as the moment to pitch Entyvio competitive PET (biosimilar tracking)
  • Prepare an Entyvio biosimilar defense research package: competitive PET + patient switching + message testing for differentiation

SharePoint: Project #1 (05 TAK_Entyvio_VERDICT_Prelaunch 2026)

Rare GI PET 2025-26

Status: Active | Latest: Aug 2025 (Eohilia tracking, Weekly Check-in deck) | Brand: Eohilia (budesonide oral suspension)

What it is: Promotional Effectiveness Tracking for Eohilia in EoE (Eosinophilic Esophagitis). Includes weekly check-in deck cadence — indicating an active tracker with regular client touchpoints.

Why it matters:

  • Only active PET on the Takeda account — the anchor tracking engagement
  • Eohilia competes with Dupixent (Sanofi/Regeneron) in EoE — competitive tracking is commercially important
  • Rare GI is a niche TA where ZoomRx has deep institutional knowledge (from Gattex multi-year PET)

Watch items:

  • Renewal timing — this is must-renew revenue; losing the only active PET would weaken the tracking foundation
  • Weekly check-in cadence suggests high client engagement — protect delivery quality

Recs:

  • Use Rare GI PET delivery calls to expand conversation to Entyvio and Gattex tracking
  • Propose adding ATU or HCP-Pt on Eohilia as upsell

SharePoint: Project #10 (TAK_Rare GI_PET_2025-26)

Gattex PET / ATU / PCA (Historical)

Status: Historical/Stale | Latest: 2024-25 (most recent PET wave) | Brand: Gattex (teduglutide, SBS)

What it is: Multi-year PET engagement (waves in 2020, 2024, 2024-25) plus ATU/PCA studies. The longest-running ZoomRx engagement on the Takeda account.

Why it matters:

  • Demonstrates that PET creates sticky, multi-year revenue at Takeda
  • ATU/PCA expansion from PET proves the upsell playbook works
  • Gattex contacts are the most tenured ZoomRx relationships at Takeda

Watch items:

  • Is the 2024-25 wave the final wave, or is renewal expected? Confirm with the account team.
  • Gattex is a mature brand in a niche market — revenue potential may be limited going forward

Derm / Immunology

Zasocitinib Color Preference RT

Status: Active | Latest: Feb 2026 (Deliverables, SOW, Survey) | Brand: Zasocitinib (TAK-279, TYK2 inhibitor)

What it is: Color Preference research testing visual branding elements for zasocitinib. Part of the pre-launch brand identity development.

Why it matters:

  • One of 3 active zasocitinib projects — demonstrates ZoomRx's pipeline engagement breadth
  • Pre-launch branding work positions ZoomRx for launch tracking
  • Color Preference RT is a niche methodology — strengthens ZoomRx's "innovation partner" positioning

Recs:

  • On delivery, pivot the conversation to launch tracking: "You have the branding. Now let's plan the PET, ATU, and Message Testing for launch."

SharePoint: Project #4 (Takeda Zasocitinib Color Preference RT)

Zasocitinib Global Pulse

Status: Recent | Latest: Nov 2025 (Proposal, KO, Call Notes) | Brand: Zasocitinib (TAK-279)

What it is: Global market landscape pulse survey for zasocitinib. Multi-market reach suggests Takeda is planning a global launch, not just US.

Why it matters:

  • Signals that Takeda's zasocitinib launch planning is global — ZoomRx needs to be positioned for both US and global tracking work
  • Call notes from this project likely contain the most detailed strategic context on zasocitinib's competitive positioning

Watch items:

  • Call notes on file — mine for competitive intelligence, launch timeline indicators, and Takeda's strategic messaging priorities

SharePoint: Project #5 (Takeda zasocitinib Global Pulse)

Psoriasis Radiographic RT 2025

Status: Recent | Latest: Sep 2025 (Analysis, Report, SOW) | Brand: Zasocitinib / Plaque Psoriasis

What it is: Radiographic RT testing — visual assessment of psoriasis clinical images by HCPs. A novel methodology that evaluates how physicians interpret and respond to radiographic/clinical evidence.

Why it matters:

  • Extremely niche methodology — very few MR firms can deliver this; positions ZoomRx as the specialist
  • Connects to zasocitinib's dermatology indication — feeds into pre-launch intelligence
  • Medical affairs involvement likely (clinical image assessment)

SharePoint: Project #9 (Takeda Psoriasis Radiographic RT - 2025)

Plaque Psoriasis Medical Data Feedback Study

Status: Recent | Latest: Oct 2025 | Brand: Zasocitinib / Plaque Psoriasis

What it is: Medical Data Feedback Study for plaque psoriasis — likely testing medical claims, data presentations, or clinical evidence framing with HCPs.

Why it matters:

  • Medical affairs engagement in dermatology
  • Paired with the Radiographic RT, this represents a comprehensive pre-launch medical evidence program for zasocitinib in PsO

SharePoint: Project #8 (TAK Plaque Psoriasis (PsO) Medical Data Feedback Study)

Rare Disease

HAE Medical Data Assessment

Status: Recent | Latest: Oct 2025 (AE Training, Deliverables, Switching Topline) | Brand: Takhzyro (lanadelumab)

What it is: Medical Data Assessment for Hereditary Angioedema — includes adverse event training materials and a switching topline (tracking patient switching patterns between HAE therapies).

Why it matters:

  • Opens the medical affairs buyer at Takeda for Rare Disease
  • Switching topline is commercially actionable intelligence — competitive dynamics between Takhzyro and alternatives (Orladeyo, Cinryze, Haegarda)
  • AE training materials suggest ZoomRx delivered both research AND training content — expanding the service scope

Recs:

  • Use this as the proof point for MSL/MEE tracking in Rare Disease
  • Propose competitive tracking (PET or ATU) for Takhzyro — the switching data creates the rationale

SharePoint: Project #6 (007 Takeda HAE Medical Data Assessment)

Hematology

Mezagitamab Color Preference RT

Status: Active | Latest: Apr 2026 (Client Materials, Survey, Call notes) | Brand: Mezagitamab (anti-CD38)

What it is: Color Preference research for mezagitamab branding in IgA Nephropathy — pre-launch visual identity development.

Why it matters:

  • Positions ZoomRx for mezagitamab launch tracking in nephrology
  • IgA Nephropathy is an emerging market (Filspari, Nefecon are recently launched competitors) — early ZoomRx engagement is valuable
  • Call notes on file — mine for competitive positioning, launch timeline, and Takeda's branding priorities

Recs:

  • On delivery, pitch launch tracking suite: PET, ATU, Message Testing, Launch KPI for IgAN market
  • Map nephrology conference opportunities (ASN, Kidney Week) for conference study expansion

SharePoint: Project #2 (Takeda Mezagitamab Color Preference RT)

Neuroscience

Neuroscience Conference Study AAN 2026

Status: Active | Latest: Mar 2026 (Pre/Post Conference surveys) | Brand: Narcolepsy pipeline / Neuroscience portfolio

What it is: Pre/post conference survey study for the American Academy of Neurology (AAN) annual meeting 2026. Tracks HCP awareness, perception shifts, and competitive intelligence around data presentations at AAN.

Why it matters:

  • 4th conference study in the Takeda neuroscience series (after World Sleep Congress, SLEEP 2025, and potentially others)
  • Demonstrates a recurring annual revenue pattern around medical conferences
  • AAN covers broader neuroscience — may include epilepsy (soticlestat) and narcolepsy data

Recs:

  • Propose a conference study retainer: 4-6 conferences/year across all Takeda TAs (GI, neuro, derm, rare disease)
  • Use AAN 2026 delivery as the pitch moment for other conference studies

SharePoint: Project #3 (TAK_Neuroscience_Conference_Study_AAN_2026)

Narcolepsy Conference Studies (World Sleep Congress + SLEEP 2025)

Status: Recent | Latest: May-Aug 2025 | Brand: Narcolepsy pipeline

What it is: Pre/post conference surveys for the World Sleep Congress 2025 and SLEEP 2025 — two major sleep medicine conferences.

Why it matters:

  • Established the conference study template that AAN 2026 follows
  • Narcolepsy is a concentrated market (Jazz dominant) — Takeda's pipeline entry needs competitive intelligence from conference presentations

SharePoint: Projects #11 (TAK_Narcolepsy_World Sleep Congress 2025 + TAK_Narcolepsy_SLEEP 2025)

Cross-TA / Innovation

Takeda AI Workshop

Status: Complete | Latest: Oct 2025 (Transcripts, Offsite Presentation) | Brand: Cross-TA

What it is: An AI-focused workshop that ZoomRx conducted with Takeda — including offsite presentation and transcripts on file. This is not a research project but a strategic engagement showcasing ZoomRx's AI capabilities.

Why it matters:

  • Strongest signal of above-brand strategic interest from Takeda
  • Transcripts and offsite presentation are on file — contain intelligence about Takeda's AI priorities and appetite for innovation
  • Potential gateway to Dynamic Dialogues, Sagan, AI-powered analysis, and other AI-differentiated offerings

Watch items:

  • Was there follow-up? If the AI Workshop did not lead to an AI-enabled project, the account team should re-engage with a specific proposal
  • Identify the Takeda stakeholder who authorized this workshop — likely the highest-value above-brand contact

Recs:

  • Read the transcripts to extract Takeda's AI priorities and pain points
  • Prepare a specific AI-enabled project proposal (e.g., AI Dynamic Dialogues for zasocitinib pre-launch HCP research) and pitch to the same stakeholder

SharePoint: Project #7 (Takeda AI Workshop)

Key Historical Projects (Stale but Informative)

Project TA Years Active Significance
Gattex PET (multiple waves) GI 2020, 2024, 2024-25 Longest-running engagement; proves PET renewal pattern at Takeda
Gattex ATU/PCA (multiple quarters) GI Multiple Upsell from PET to ATU/PCA — proves methodology expansion works
Motegrity PET GI 2020, 2021 Chronic constipation tracker; product divested or deprioritized
Motegrity HCP-Pt Conversations GI ~2021 First non-PET methodology at Takeda (HCP-Pt)
Ninlaro PET 2021 Oncology 2021 Myeloma tracker; likely lapsed as Ninlaro matured
Epilepsy PET Neuroscience 2021 (baseline + TBD) If soticlestat advances, this re-activates
Vyvanse RT ParentPulse 2020 Neuroscience 2020 ADHD parent research; Vyvanse facing generics
Pevonedistat PET 2021 Oncology 2021 Early-stage oncology asset; development status unclear
Millennium/Takeda Onc Oncology Historical Oncology-specific engagement; contacts may still be active
GenMed Cross-TA Historical General medicine engagement; scope unclear

Historical pattern: Projects cluster in GI (Gattex, Motegrity) and early oncology (Ninlaro, Pevonedistat). The shift from GI-only to multi-TA began in 2025, driven by zasocitinib, narcolepsy, and rare disease expansion.

Pipeline / Upcoming Work

Confirmed or Highly Likely

Opportunity TA Type Timing Rationale
Entyvio competitive tracking GI PET or ATU Post-VERDICT delivery Biosimilar entry creates tracking demand
Conference study (next conference cycle) Neuroscience Conference Study Q3-Q4 2026 Pattern of recurring conference studies established

High Priority Pursuits

Opportunity TA Type Est. Value Rationale
Zasocitinib launch PET Derm/Immunology PET $100-150K/wave Phase 3 readout triggers launch tracking; ZoomRx has pre-launch context
Zasocitinib Message Testing Derm/Immunology Message Testing $80-120K Pre-launch message optimization; natural follow-on from Color Pref RT
Entyvio biosimilar defense PET GI PET $100-150K/wave Biosimilar tracking is urgent and high-value
MSL/MEE (any TA) Cross-TA MSL Tracking $60-100K/TA Zero MSL tracking at Takeda across 5+ TAs; greenfield
Mezagitamab launch suite Hematology PET + ATU + Launch KPI $200-300K If Phase 3 succeeds; IgAN launch tracking

Medium Priority

Opportunity TA Type Est. Value Rationale
Takhzyro competitive PET Rare Disease PET $80-120K HAE switching data creates rationale
Eohilia ATU or HCP-Pt GI ATU or HCP-Pt $60-80K Upsell from active Rare GI PET
AI-enabled project (Dynamic Dialogues) Cross-TA AI $40-80K AI Workshop follow-through; above-brand engagement
Conference study retainer Cross-TA Conference Study $150-250K/year 4-6 conferences/year across all TAs

Cross-Workstream Themes

1. Pre-Launch Positioning Is the Account's Strategic Moat

Five of 11 active projects are pre-launch or franchise defense research. No competitor has this breadth of pre-launch engagement at Takeda. The account team must convert this pre-launch positioning into post-launch tracking mandates — the window for locking in PET and ATU proposals is before launch, not after.

2. Novel Methodologies Drive the Relationship but Not Revenue

Color Preference RTs, Radiographic RTs, and Conference Studies are what differentiate ZoomRx at Takeda — but they generate lower per-project revenue ($25-60K) than core tracking services (PET at $100-150K, ATU at $60-100K). The commercial imperative is to use novel methodologies as the door-opener and core tracking as the revenue anchor.

3. No Recurring Tracker on a Flagship Brand

The only active PET is Rare GI (Eohilia) — a niche TA. Entyvio and Takhzyro, the two largest Takeda franchises, have no recurring ZoomRx tracker. Getting PET established on one of these franchises is the single highest-impact BD action on the account.

4. Conference Study Revenue Could Be Systematized

Four conference studies in 12 months across neuroscience demonstrates a pattern. If expanded to GI (DDW, ACG, UEG), dermatology (AAD, EADV), rare disease (NORD, WORLDSymposium), and hematology (ASN, ASH), the conference study program alone could generate $150-250K annually on a retainer basis.

Immediate Priorities

  1. Deliver Entyvio VERDICT flawlessly. This is the gateway to Takeda's largest franchise. Client satisfaction determines whether Entyvio becomes a recurring engagement.

  2. Mine zasocitinib call notes. The Global Pulse (Nov 2025) and Color Pref RT (Feb 2026) call notes likely contain launch timeline signals, competitive positioning, and Takeda's messaging priorities. Extract and document.

  3. Pitch zasocitinib launch tracking. Prepare a zasocitinib launch suite proposal (PET + ATU + Message Testing + Launch KPI) for delivery when Phase 3 data reads out. Present timing options: file pre-launch proposal now, or wait for approval?

  4. Confirm Rare GI PET renewal timing. The only active PET must renew. Get the renewal decision date and protect it.

  5. Read AI Workshop transcripts. The transcripts contain intelligence about Takeda's AI priorities, the authorizing stakeholder's identity, and follow-up opportunities. This is the highest-value unread document on the account.

  6. Map contacts from all active SOWs. The contact map is empty. Every SOW on file has client contact names. Extract them systematically.

Back to Accounts Hub | Home

Governing Thought
Takeda has 11 active projects across 5+ therapeutic areas — making it the most diverse ZoomRx account by TA count and methodology breadth. The project portfolio includes PET, Conference Studies, Color Preference RTs, Radiographic RTs, a Global Pulse, Medical Data Assessments, a prelaunch study, and an AI Workshop. Cross-Workstream Themes
1. Pre-Launch Positioning Is the Account's Strategic Moat
Five of 11 active projects are pre-launch or franchise defense research. No competitor has this breadth of pre-launch engagement at Takeda. The account team must convert this pre-launch positioning into post-launch tracking mandates — the window for locking in PET and ATU proposals is before launch, not after.
2. Novel Methodologies Drive the Relationship but Not Revenue
Color Preference RTs, Radiographic RTs, and Conference Studies are what differentiate ZoomRx at Takeda — but they generate lower per-project revenue ($25-60K) than core tracking services (PET at $100-150K, ATU at $60-100K). The commercial imperative is to use novel methodologies as the door-opener and core tracking as the revenue anchor.
3. No Recurring Tracker on a Flagship Brand
The only active PET is Rare GI (Eohilia) — a niche TA. Entyvio and Takhzyro, the two largest Takeda franchises, have no recurring ZoomRx tracker. Getting PET established on one of these franchises is the single highest-impact BD action on the account.
4. Conference Study Revenue Could Be Systematized
Four conference studies in 12 months across neuroscience demonstrates a pattern. If expanded to GI (DDW, ACG, UEG), dermatology (AAD, EADV), rare disease (NORD, WORLDSymposium), and hematology (ASN, ASH), the conference study program alone could generate $150-250K annually on a retainer basis.

Immediate Priorities
